title: Biden, Xi Jinping meet face-to-face at G20 Summit; amidst superpower tensions
description: The highly anticipated meeting is being held on the margins of the Group of 20 summit of world leaders in Indonesia.
keywords: Joe Biden, Xi JInping, Meet, G@) Summit, China, USA, US, Indonesia
snippet:
US President Joe Biden and Chinese President Xi Jinping shake hands, as they meet face-to-face for the first time since Biden took office. | Twitter/ CNN
